children.heading: Priority to be given to Indian organizations with respect to certain agreements
children.label: a Priority to be given to Indian organizations with respect to certain agreements

children.text: lend Native American artifacts and objects from any collection of the Smithsonian Institution;
sponsor or coordinate traveling exhibitions of artifacts and objects; or
programs to serve Indian tribes and communities; and

in cooperation with educational institutions, including tribally controlled colleges or universities (as defined in ), programs to enhance the opportunities for Indians in the areas of museum studies, management, and research.section 1801(a) of title 25

children.heading: Indian Museum Management Fellowships
children.label: c Indian Museum Management Fellowships
children.text: The Board of Regents shall establish an Indian Museum Management Fellowship program to provide stipend support to Indians for training in museum development and management.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated $2,000,000 for each fiscal year, beginning with fiscal year 1991, to carry out subsections (b) and (c).
